text:
Jemaine is one of the four cosplayers dressed as a Survey Corps soldier in Attack on Demoncon, the tenth story of the Attack on Titan Anthology.

Appearance

Jemaine has black hair styled in a mohawk haircut. During the Demoncon he wears the Survey Corps uniform with a white shirt and two fake swords.

Story

Dressed up as a Survey Corps member, Jemaine attends the Demoncon with Gin, John and Brian. He calms Brian's enthusiasm when he notices a trio of women disguised as Colossus Titans, but acting in character, he also tells the other cosplayers that his group is here to protect everyone from Titans. The two groups meet and they put on a show.

On seeing Gin get slapped by Lisa, one of the three ladies, Jemaine comes closer and asks him what he had done. Lisa gets angry and begins to act as if she was the Colossus Titan, which makes Gin, Brian and John decide to attack her, to which Jemaine advises to talk to her instead. They do not listen to him and react as if they were Survey Corps soldiers, which makes Jemaine ashamed.

After Lisa is done beating up the three men, Jemaine smiles as he watches them lying on the floor.
